description: Couple-user chat turn — partner context + couple memory present. Prompt must include partner-scoped facts. Also acts as a USER_COMPILED=compiled telemetry check.

input.message: What should I plan for Sarah's birthday next weekend?

seededContext.profile: Name: Alex. Partner: Sarah. Timezone: America/New_York.

compiledArtifacts.content: Alex — works remote, partner Sarah, likes planning ahead.
Sarah loves Italian food; her birthday is June 15; prefers small gatherings.
